title: LiveKit API credentials should not be disclosed
description: LiveKit is an open-source real-time audio/video infrastructure platform. LiveKit credentials include API keys and secret keys used to generate access tokens for rooms. Exposing these credentials allows unauthorized access to video rooms, eavesdropping on private communications, and disruption of live sessions.
recommendation: Remove LiveKit credentials from source code. Store API key and secret in environment variables. Rotate immediately in your LiveKit Cloud dashboard or self-hosted configuration.
impact: Unauthorized room creation, access to ongoing video/audio sessions, ability to eject participants, and compromise of private communications.

checks.message: LiveKit API secret detected. LiveKit API secrets are used to generate JWT access tokens for real-time video/audio rooms. Exposing this secret allows generating tokens to join any room, eavesdrop on private video/audio sessions, eject legitimate participants, and control room settings. Rotate immediately in your LiveKit Cloud dashboard or server configuration.
LiveKit API key detected. LiveKit API keys identify your server application and are paired with an API secret for token generation. Ensure no API secret is hardcoded alongside this key.
